modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need new print driver for copier to enter code.

full_description_text:  
I need the new driver for the copier.  
I can't enter the departmental code.  
I want to print from my office computer.  
Please help me with this issue.
short_description: Need new print driver for copier to enter code.
description:

I can't enter the departmental code.  
I want to print from my office computer.
